items.title: Allen's 47-ball ton powers KKR to huge win over DC
items.summary: KKR's spinners restricted DC to just 142, and Allen gunned that total down almost singlehandedly
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: From prospect to castaway to favorite: The resurrection of Julian Rodriguez's career
items.summary: One loss derailed Rodriguez's career, but he's built himself back up heading into Sunday's Zuffa Boxing 06
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Fifa triples price of top World Cup final ticket to $32,970 as US politicians voice concerns
items.summary: Previous high for Category 1 had been $10,990 Resale tickets for final listed from $8,000 to $11.5m New Jersey reps pen letter to Infantino about ticketing Fifa tripled the pric...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
